modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues with the Open Enrollment process in the Employee Space Portal

full_description_text:  
I was trying to go through the Open Enrollment process in the Employee Space Portal, but it just wasn’t working for me. I clicked on everything, but nothing seemed to happen, and I couldn’t figure out what to do next. It’s kind of frustrating because I really need to get this sorted out before the deadline.
